subDescription.accessibilityText: 45 minutes ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text:
🚀 Hiring: Generalist Experts (Remote | Hourly Contract)
💼 Company: Mercor
🌍 Location: 100% Remote
💰 Pay: $23–$30/hour

🔍 About the Role

Mercor is partnering with a leading AI lab to onboard detail-oriented Generalist Experts for an exciting data annotation project.
You’ll play a key role in shaping next-generation AI systems by organizing, labeling, and improving diverse datasets. If you enjoy working with structured thinking, analysis, and problem-solving—this is for you.

🧠 What You’ll Do

Synthesize large volumes of information into structured outputs
Annotate and categorize text, images, and datasets
Apply predefined rubrics and taxonomies
Identify inconsistencies or errors in data
Contribute directly to improving AI model performance

✅ What We’re Looking For

Strong analytical thinking & attention to detail
Excellent reading comprehension and communication skills
Ability to work with structured guidelines and frameworks
Prior annotation or taxonomy experience (a plus, not required)
Bachelor’s degree preferred

⏱ Engagement Details

~20 hours/week (flexible schedule)
Fully remote, asynchronous work
Weekly payments via Stripe/Wise
Contract-based role

🌟 Why Join?

Work with cutting-edge AI labs
Flexible work on your own schedule
Competitive pay
Be part of building the future of AI

📩 How to Apply
Comment GENERALIST below or DM us — we'll send you the direct application link.
💬 Know someone who fits this role? Tag them below or share this post!
#Hiring #RemoteJobs #AI #DataAnnotation #Freelance #Generalist #WorkFromHome #TechJobs

subDescription.accessibilityText: 55 minutes ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text:
Hiring: Senior GL Accountant. Hybrid, reporting to Bath, MI office once monthly 2-3 days, remote remainder of the month. CPA Prefered.
SaaS industry experience required with ASC 606 & ASC 340.
Reporting to the Controller, you will support the day to day corporate accounting function!.
Our client is a successful SaaS industry company. You will support the corporate GAAP accounting day to day.
This is a newly created "Hybrid" full time permanent position reporting to the Controller Monday- Friday. Fully staffed integrated department.
You will have minimum 3 years experience with full cycle GL GAAP, financial reporting and assisting with month end close. 
At least 3 years of audit experience at a public accounting firm, or at least 4 years of combined public accounting and private industry experience
A minimum of 4 years in Senior Accountant or progressively responsible roles at an institutionally backed SaaS company (Private Equity or Venture Capital), or At least 4 combined years between a public accounting firm and audited SaaS companies, with a minimum of 2 years in each setting
Deep, working knowledge of US GAAP, including:
ASC 606 (Revenue Recognition) and SaaS-specific revenue recognition
Contract review and performance obligation analysis.
ASC 340 (contract costs/commissions).
BS in accounting is required.
Experience working with AI tools and incorporating into everyday workstreams, such as Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, etc.
Advanced Excel user!
CPA Prefered!
This is a professional office environment with a great employee culture!
Salary range$110 -125k + bonus & full benefits and PTO.

text.text:
12-Min Unboxing: AI-Proof BI FinTech PM Consultant Accelerator - My $10K+/Mo Roadmap + Blueprint

12-Min Unboxing: AI-Proof BI FinTech PM Consultant Accelerator – My $10K+/Mo Roadmap + Full Blueprint

🚀 AI is murdering tactical white-collar work. McKinsey says 50% of jobs gone by 2028. Geoffrey Hinton says “become a plumber.”

I say we do better.

I’m Hassan Hammer - aerospace engineer turned $400K+/year ($18K+/mo take-home) BI FinTech PM consultant. I escaped the soul-crushing 9-5 grind, built this program from 10 years of frontline notes and 4,000+ tracked hours, and now I’m handing you the exact blueprint I used.

In this clean 12-minute unboxing walk you through the complete roadmap:
* Triple globally-recognized certifications (PSM + PMP + CPMAI) via my reverse-learning method
* Frontline consulting knowledge (Waterfall → Agile → AI Orchestration) so you actually know what you’re doing on day one
* Two portfolio pieces that make hiring managers stop scrolling:
  • Agentic AI web app (the same live job board I built with N8N + xAI)
  • Vision PPM - the $60K vendor-grade demand management solution I built myself
* My always-on recruiter job board (free for you) that aggregates real $10K+/mo contracts the second they hit my inbox
* Private WhatsApp group + weekly live sessions with me
* Satisfaction Guarantee: You do the work, I deliver the support for $10K+/mo results — or I refund you (6-month window + 80% attendance required)

This isn’t another cert mill. This is one man, one source, built from first principles with the end result locked in: you become a competent, AI-proof PM consultant who commands premium contracts and lives the loaded freedom you actually want.

I did it. Remote from Costa Rica, ocean penthouses, Bali, 64th-floor Makati focus zone, and my dream Porsche 718 GTS manual. You can too.

Founder Special still open - only a few seats left at $999.
Next cohort jumps to $5,000.

Reply/DM “ROADMAP” and I’ll send you the free PDF.
Or book a no-BS strategy call here: https://lnkd.in/gP4XM4dB

Hassan Hammer B.Eng., PMP
Founder & Lead Instructor
AI-Proof BI FinTech PM Consultant Training Academy

text.text:
📌 Hiring Alert: Azure .NET Architect | R P Consulting – Denver, CO
R P Consulting India is seeking a highly skilled Azure .NET Architect for a 12-month contract role in Denver, CO. 

✨ Key Responsibilities:
🔹 Lead Technical Architecture: Serve as the primary architect for enterprise customers, guiding the design and implementation of scalable, production-ready Azure-native solutions.
🔹 AI & Agentic Frameworks: Drive the adoption of emerging AI frameworks and agentic tools, translating complex business requirements into reusable architectures that integrate AI/ML models.
🔹 System Design: Design modern UIs, RESTful APIs, microservices, and streaming systems while ensuring strict adherence to security, governance, and compliance standards.
🔹 Mentorship & Strategy: Lead code and architecture reviews, mentor engineering teams on cloud best practices, and support high-impact PoV/PoC (Proof of Value/Concept) sessions for rapid delivery.

✨ Requirements:
✔ 10–15 years of software engineering experience, with 5+ years specifically in technical architecture and design using Azure.
✔ Proven expertise in cloud-native development, microservices, and modern UI frameworks.
✔ Hands-on experience building and deploying AI/ML and agentic solutions in enterprise environments.
✔ Strong track record of creating accelerators or starter solutions for rapid delivery cycles.
✔ US Work Authorization Required (Based in Denver, CO).
✔ Excellent leadership, mentoring, and stakeholder management skills.

🌟 Benefits:
▪ Annual Salary: USD 140,000 – 180,000.
▪ Contract Stability: 12-month term with exposure to enterprise-scale consulting.
▪ Cutting-Edge Tech: Hands-on involvement with advanced Azure services and emerging AI frameworks.
▪ Career Path: Progression into Enterprise Architect or Lead Cloud Architect roles.

📩 Apply Now: Send your updated CV (including work authorization and current location) directly to recruit@rpconsultingindia.in.net.

title.text: How to Hire a Digital Marketing Agency: Complete 2024 Guide for Business Owners

navigationContext.accessibilityText: Open article: How to Hire a Digital Marketing Agency: Complete 2024 Guide for Business Owners by images.pexels.com

subDescription.accessibilityText: 37 minutes ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text:
🎯 Hiring a digital marketing agency can be a game-changer for your business – or a costly mistake. The difference lies in knowing what to look for.

After working with hundreds of businesses, we've seen the same patterns emerge. Companies that ask the right questions upfront, understand pricing models, and spot red flags early get exceptional results. Those who don't... well, let's just say they learn expensive lessons.

The landscape has evolved dramatically in 2024. AI integration, privacy changes, and new platforms mean your agency needs to be ahead of the curve, not playing catch-up.

Key areas smart business owners evaluate:
✅ Proven track record in your industry
✅ Transparent reporting and communication
✅ Clear ROI measurement frameworks
✅ Comprehensive service offerings vs. specialists
✅ Cultural fit and partnership approach

But there's so much more to consider – from contract terms to performance benchmarks.

Whether you're hiring your first agency or switching from an underperformer, this decision will impact your growth trajectory for years to come.

We've compiled everything you need to know into a comprehensive guide that walks you through the entire evaluation process.

Read our complete 2024 guide to hiring a digital marketing agency: https://lnkd.in/eKuNpXmy

#DigitalMarketing #BusinessGrowth #MarketingAgency #SEO #PaidAds #BusinessStrategy #MarketingROI #AgencyPartnership

title.text: [Hiring] Compliance Officer REMOTE USA | Gulf Career Hunt

navigationContext.accessibilityText: Open article: [Hiring] Compliance Officer REMOTE USA | Gulf Career Hunt by gulfcareerhunt.com

subDescription.accessibilityText: 11 minutes ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

text.text:
Position: Compliance Officer

Date Posted: April 4, 2026
Industry: AI Research / Compliance / Professional Services
Employment Type: Contract (3–4 weeks)
Experience: 4+ years of professional experience in relevant field
Qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in Law, Business, Finance, Compliance, or related field (or equivalent professional experience)
Salary: $90 – $150 per hour
Location: United States (Remote)
Company: Mercor
Description:
Mercor is a fast-growing platform that connects top-tier creative and technical professionals with leading artificial intelligence research labs. Headquartered in San Francisco, the company is backed by prominent investors including Benchmark, General Catalyst, Peter Thiel, Adam D’Angelo, Larry Summers, and Jack Dorsey, reflecting its strong position in the AI talent ecosystem.
The organization is currently hiring a Compliance Officer on a short-term contract basis to support high-impact AI research initiatives. This role is fully remote and offers flexible working hours, making it ideal for experienced professionals who can contribute independently while managing their own schedule.
The selected candidate will play a critical role in applying domain expertise to real-world compliance and operational challenges, helping improve AI systems through structured task creation, problem-solving, and expert input.
Key Responsibilities:
 • Develop structured tasks and deliverables based on common compliance-related requests within the domain
• Analyze real-world problems and provide expert-level solutions to support AI research development
• Work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision
• Contribute subject matter expertise to cutting-edge AI research projects
• Ensure accuracy, clarity, and compliance-focused reasoning in all assigned tasks
• Support continuous improvement of AI training and evaluation processes
Qualifications (Must-Have):
 • Minimum 4+ years of professional experience in compliance or a related field
• Strong written communication skills with excellent grammar and attention to detail
• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote setup
• Experience handling structured tasks and analytical problem-solving in professional environments

APPLY HERE  
https://lnkd.in/ddpRy_yV 

Disclaimer: The job details above are structured for clarity and based on publicly available content from recruiters/Company pages. All rights remain with the original source; names may be withheld for confidentiality. We are not involved in the hiring process.
